$comment: SQLite testfixture arc (F001A blocker clear, 2026-07-18): RUN witness for shipped <sched.h> (sched.json), the descriptor that clears test4.c's F001A. `sched_yield()` (weak libc.so.6 / libSystem export) is CALLED at runtime and returns 0 → exit 42. Three unix ABIs (POSIX header, sched.json availableObjectFormats:[elf,macho]): elf x86_64 + arm64 (Linux WSL/qemu run-green legs) + arm64-macho (macos-latest CI). Release arm runs the optimizer over the call. RED-ON-DISABLE: drop sched_yield from sched.json → undeclared → compile fails; a broken (unexported) import would fail loud at load (127), never silently.
